name: IdsPrmRateAgeCatRowCntBal

text.value: WITH cte AS (SELECT TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT.AGE_BAND_REF_ID AS TRGT_AGE_BAND_REF_ID, TRGT.AGE_FROM_NO AS TRGT_AGE_FROM_NO, SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AS SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, SRC.AGE_BAND_REF_ID AS SRC_AGE_BAND_REF_ID, SRC.AGE_FROM_NO AS SRC_AGE_FROM_NO FROM @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT AS TRGT FULL OUTER JOIN @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_IDSOwner}.B_PRM_RATE_AGE_CAT AS SRC ON TRGT.SRC_SYS_CD_SK=SRC.SRC_SYS_CD_SK AND TRGT.AGE_BAND_REF_ID=SRC.AGE_BAND_REF_ID AND TRGT.AGE_FROM_NO=SRC.AGE_FROM_NO WHERE TRGT.LAST_UPDT_RUN_CYC_EXCTN_SK=@{pipeline().parameters.ExtrRunCycle}) DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.RESEARCH_TMP_IdsPrmRateAgeCatRowCntBal; SELECT TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, TRGT_AGE_BAND_REF_ID, SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK, SRC_AGE_BAND_REF_ID, TRGT_AGE_FROM_NO, SRC_AGE_FROM_NO INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.RESEARCH_TMP_IdsPrmRateAgeCatRowCntBal FROM cte WHERE SRC_AGE_BAND_REF_ID IS NULL OR SRC_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR TRGT_AGE_BAND_REF_ID IS NULL OR TRGT_SRC_SYS_CD_SK IS NULL OR SRC_AGE_FROM_NO IS NULL OR TRGT_AGE_FROM_NO IS NULL; DROP TABLE IF EXISTS @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.NOTIFY_TMP_IdsPrmRateAgeCatRowCntBal; SELECT TOP(1) 'ROW COUNT BALANCING FACETS - IDS PREMIUM RATING AGE CATEGORY IS OUT OF TOLERANCE' AS NOTIFICATION INTO @{pipeline().globalParameters.gbl_param_ids_staging}.NOTIFY_TMP_IdsPrmRateAgeCatRowCntBal FROM cte WHERE '@{pipeline().parameters.ToleranceCd}'='OUT'
